title: Work-order add-suggested-condition asset
definition: The native interface texture identity used by the per-row control that adds a generated work-order condition.

facts.statement: The native renderer associates the interface token WORK_ORDERS_ADD_SUGGESTED_CONDITION with the add-suggested-condition control.
In the pinned recorder-v2 frame, the two addable suggestions share the same 4-by-3 lower-plane control texture while the matching existing-condition row has no corresponding control cells.

uncertainties.statement: The resting control and its absent state are captured, but hover, pressed, and any independently disabled texture variants have not yet been recorded.

positive: The control-present state resolves to the native add-suggested-condition interface token.
boundary: Normal, hovered, pressed, disabled, or absent variants are distinguished only when their native identities are independently captured.
counterexamples: A generic text, emoji, or unrelated plus asset must not substitute for this known native interface token.

absenceGuards: Do not invent unobserved hover, pressed, or disabled asset variants.

requiredFrames: Matching suggestion with the control absent
